title: The Front Gate Falls
description: Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.
scene: Across pages 2, 4, 6, 7, this part follows Nami, Kashii, Sanji, Chopper, Sogeking. Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know what you're doing here...

dialogue.speaker: Kashii
dialogue.text: Yeah Kashii, I think so too.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey!! You know what to do?

summary: Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.
